title: Digital Transformation Growth in LATAM Underpins Equinix US$45M Investment in Its Second Data Center in Colombia
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Oct. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced a US$45 million investment in Colombia for the construction of BG2, a new International Business Exchange™ (IBX®) data center in Bogotá, scheduled to open in the first half of 2023.

title: Ecosystem-Connected Businesses Expanded More in the Last 5 Quarters Than in the Past 5 Years

title: Equinix: Macroeconomic Uncertainties Threaten Future Dividend Growth Prospects
text: Economic uncertainties represent a big risk for the company. Foreign exchange risk has already harmed the revenue guidance for 2022 by $102 million. Moreover, high electricity prices threaten to tighten profit margins in the short term.

title: Equinix (EQIX) Expands Into Indonesia With IBX Data Center
text: Catering to the growth of the local digital economy and digital transformation strategies in the Indonesian market, Equinix (EQIX) expands with the $74-million data center investment.

title: Equinix Expands to Indonesia with $74M Data Center Investment
text: JAKARTA, Indonesia and REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Oct. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- To support increasing demand for the digital services essential to powering today's businesses, Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced its expansion to Indonesia with plans for an approximately $74 million International Business Exchange™ (IBX®) data center in the heart of Jakarta.

title: REITs Continue Drop Amid Waning Economy
text: Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs) have continued their slide in recent months as global economic circumstances remain flimsy. The Real Estate Select Sector ( XLRE , Financial) ETF's approximately 6% surplus downturn compared to the rest of the S&P 500 is a sign of the times, and it's unlikely to change anytime soon in my opinion.

title: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for Third-Quarter Results
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Oct. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced that it will hold its quarterly conference call on Wednesday, November 2 at 5:30 p.m.
